title.purpose: The card front in review, the focal prompt.

body-lg.purpose: The card back answer and longer reading.

label.purpose: State chips, field labels, meta, stat counts. Sentence case.

mono.purpose: Code on cards, keyboard hints, interval previews, card IDs.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: The single resting elevation, reserved for the review card.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Dialogs and popovers. Soft, warm-tinted, never a hard black drop.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and reveals.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Card flip, dialog enter, focus ring.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Brand primary action: clay fill, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(0.52 0.13 47); color: #fff; font: 500 0.875rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.46 0.135 46); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.40 0.09 220); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action: white surface, strong border, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.87 0.004 250); border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: oklch(0.26 0.008 60); font: 500 0.875rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.965 0.003 250); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.40 0.09 220); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Icon Button
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost" aria-label="Edit card"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 20h9"/><path d="M16.5 3.5a2.12 2.12 0 0 1 3 3L7 19l-4 1 1-4Z"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.26 0.008 60); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.965 0.003 250); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.40 0.09 220); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Single-line field; clay focus border + tint ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.87 0.004 250); border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: oklch(0.26 0.008 60); font: 400 0.875rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.48 0.006 60); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.52 0.13 47); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.95 0.03 55); }

components.name: State Chip
components.description: Soft labelled card-state tag (New / Learning / Review / Relearning). Color always paired with text.
components.css: .ds-chip-review { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px; background: oklch(0.95 0.04 150); color: oklch(0.43 0.10 150); font: 500 0.75rem/1.4 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Rating Button (Good)
components.description: One cell of the FSRS rating grid. Filled semantic color, white text, mono interval sub-label. Keys 1-4.
components.css: .ds-rating-good { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 10px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(0.56 0.13 150); color: #fff; font: 500 0.875rem/1.2 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-rating-good:hover { background: oklch(0.50 0.13 150); } .ds-rating-good:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.26 0.008 60); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-rating-interval { font: 400 0.75rem/1 JetBrains Mono, ui-monospace, monospace; opacity: 0.85; }

components.name: Deck Card
components.description: Flat white card, hairline border, no resting shadow.
components.html:
JavaScript Fundamentals

Core language before the frameworks.

24 cards8 due
components.css: .ds-deck-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.003 250); border-radius: 12px; background: #fff; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-deck-card:hover { border-color: oklch(0.87 0.004 250); } .ds-deck-title { color: oklch(0.26 0.008 60); font: 600 0.875rem/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; } .ds-deck-title:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-deck-desc { margin: 0; color: oklch(0.48 0.006 60); font: 400 0.875rem/1.5 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-deck-meta { margin-top: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; color: oklch(0.48 0.006 60); font: 500 0.75rem/1.4 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Review Card
components.description: The focal study surface. 16px radius, generous padding, the only surface granted the Lift shadow.
components.html:
What does the FSRS algorithm schedule?

The next review date for each card, based on recall performance.
components.css: .ds-review-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 260px; padding: 40px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.003 250); border-radius: 16px; background: #fff; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.26 0.008 60 / 0.05), 0 1px 3px oklch(0.26 0.008 60 / 0.06); } .ds-review-front { margin: 0; color: oklch(0.26 0.008 60); font: 500 1.25rem/1.35 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-review-divider { width: 96px; height: 1px; margin: 24px 0; background: oklch(0.92 0.003 250); } .ds-review-back { margin: 0; color: oklch(0.40 0.006 60); font: 400 1.125rem/1.55 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Sticky translucent top bar with backdrop blur (the one sanctioned glass moment), hairline bottom border, clay brand mark.
components.html: ArminSettings
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 56px; padding: 0 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.003 250); background: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); } .ds-nav-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; color: oklch(0.26 0.008 60); text-decoration: none; font: 600 0.9375rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-brand svg { color: oklch(0.52 0.13 47); } .ds-nav-link { padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 8px; color: oklch(0.48 0.006 60); text-decoration: none; font: 400 0.875rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: oklch(0.965 0.003 250); color: oklch(0.26 0.008 60); }

narrative.overview: Armin should feel like a well-kept personal notebook, not a productivity dashboard. Paper-calm surfaces, ink-clear type, and a structure you can trust at a glance: what's due, what's learned, what's locked behind a prerequisite. The interface is a quiet place to do focused work over weeks and months, so it stays out of the way and lets the card being learned be the loudest thing on screen. Warmth is carried by a single clay accent and the typography, never by a tinted, busy background. The system rejects the generic SaaS dashboard, Anki-style clutter, the flashy marketing site, and anything gamified or childish. One warm clay carries identity and primary action; one deep petrol carries links and the prerequisite graph; the four FSRS rating colors are a reserved semantic vocabulary the brand never borrows from.
keyCharacteristics: Paper-calm light surface; warmth comes from the clay accent and ink, not the background.
One brand color (clay) + one accent (petrol); rating and state colors are semantic, not decorative.
Flat by default: tonal layering and hairline borders, shadows only on floating elements.
Single sans for the whole UI; mono reserved for code on cards and keyboard hints.
Keyboard-first, so focus states are always visible and never subtle.

rules.name: The Reserved-Semantics Rule
rules.body: Red, amber, green, and blue belong to review meaning (Again / Hard / Good / Easy and the matching states). The brand never uses them decoratively, and the brand color is never one of them. If a UI element needs an accent, it is clay or petrol, never a rating hue.

rules.name: The Carried-Warmth Rule
rules.body: Warmth lives in clay and ink, never in the background. The page is cool-neutral paper. Tinting the bg warm to feel cozy while the primary is also warm is forbidden.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Inter carries every label, button, heading, and paragraph. Reach for mono only when the content is code or a key. A second display typeface is prohibited.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Rule
rules.body: Labels and chips are sentence case. No all-caps tracked eyebrows above sections.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest; their edge is a hairline border on a tonal step. A shadow is permission to float, granted only to the review card (Lift) and to overlays (Overlay).

dos: Do make the brand clay (oklch(0.52 0.13 47)) and the accent petrol (oklch(0.40 0.09 220)) the only non-semantic colors; let everything else be neutral.
Do keep review meaning in the reserved red/amber/green/blue scale, and always pair a state color with its text label.
Do keep surfaces flat with hairline borders; grant a shadow only to the review card and to overlays.
Do keep focus rings boldly visible (2px petrol, 2px offset). This is a keyboard-first study tool.
Do size type on the fixed rem scale and let weight carry hierarchy with one sans family.
Do hold body, label, and placeholder text to at least 4.5:1; lean ink, not light gray.
donts: Don't build a generic SaaS dashboard: no blue gradients, no hero-metric panels, no decorative card grids of icon + heading + text.
Don't get cluttered like Anki: keep depth and options behind a calm first screen.
Don't make it a flashy marketing site: no decorative motion, no gradient-as-decoration.
Don't go gamified or childish: no mascots, confetti storms, or loud badges.
Don't use the brand clay as a rating color, or a rating color as decoration.
Don't tint the page background warm to feel cozy. Warmth is clay and ink; the page stays cool-neutral paper.
Don't use border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe, gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism. The nav backdrop-blur is the single sanctioned glass use.
Don't add all-caps tracked eyebrows above sections, or numbered 01 / 02 section markers.
